title: Teen milestone: 40 lessons
text: Forty lessons in. Your speed is double what it was on day one — that's real progress. Keep showing up; the second half is where things really click into place.
tips: Block 4 brings pure speed sprints next

character_tips.anna: 🎯 40 lessons in. Track your number — Block 4 will push it higher.
character_tips.maxim: Halfway through. Pace yourself, but don't lose the gain.
